en-US.title: IELTS Speaking Simulator
en-US.subtitle: AI examiner, real band scores
en-US.description:
Sit the IELTS Speaking test whenever you're ready.

IELTS Speaking is a full simulator of the real exam: a live AI examiner conducts the authentic three-part format — the interview, the cue-card long turn with one minute of preparation, and the discussion — with real timing, real question styles, and real past-paper topics.

WHAT YOU GET AFTER EVERY SESSION
• A band score on the four official criteria: Fluency & Coherence, Lexical Resource, Grammatical Range & Accuracy, and Pronunciation — whole bands per criterion, exactly like the real exam
• The full conversation as a transcript, with your mistakes highlighted — tap any highlighted phrase to see the fix
• Complete audio playback of the conversation, both voices
• Your own answers rewritten at Band 8, readable and listenable, so you can hear exactly what a higher band sounds like with your ideas
• Priority fixes and practice drills built from your actual errors

PRACTICE YOUR WAY
• Full exam, or drill a single part
• Four examiners with distinct voices and temperaments — from warm and patient to stern and demanding, so exam-day pressure is nothing new
• Casual chat mode: your examiner off duty, for relaxed conversation practice
• A phrasebook that collects your corrected phrases, and a band trend across your history

Built on real past-paper questions across hundreds of topics. If a session is interrupted — a call, a dead battery — your recording is kept and scored when you return.

review.notes: Sign in with the demo account, tap 'Begin exam' (or 'Casual chat'), allow microphone access, and speak with the AI examiner. The exam is a live voice conversation (requires a quiet environment and microphone). After finishing, the report screen shows the band score, transcript, audio playback, and Band 8 rewrites. Past scored sessions are available under History if you prefer not to speak.
